name: Chocolate-Peanut Butter Cups
recipeIngredient: 1 Refrigerated ready-to-slice Peanut Butter Cookie Dough (15-oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the cookie dough into 3/4-inch slices.
2. Cut each slice into quarters.
3. Place each quarter into a lightly greased 1-3/4-inch muffin cup.
4. No shaping is necessary.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes (dough will rise during baking).
6. Remove the muffin pan from the oven and immediately press a miniature peanut butter cup gently and evenly into each cookie.
7. Cool cookies before removing them from the pans.
8. Refrigerate the cookie cups until firm.
Yield: 4 dozen.
